zh.title: 帕拉塞尔苏斯预言全集 - 炼金术之父的预言与验证 | Paracelsus Prophecies
zh.description: 瑞士-德意志医师、炼金术士帕拉塞尔苏斯（1493-1541）留下的预言完整收录，涵盖医学革命、文明兴衰、宗教改革等领域。被誉为毒理学之父，其《预言书》对后世影响深远。
zh.keywords: 帕拉塞尔苏斯,Paracelsus,预言,炼金术,毒理学之父,Prognostications,预言书,霍恩海姆,中世纪预言
zh.ogTitle: 帕拉塞尔苏斯预言全集 | Paracelsus Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 瑞士-德意志医师、炼金术士帕拉塞尔苏斯留下的预言完整收录与验证分析。涵盖医学革命、文明兴衰、宗教改革等领域。

en.title: Paracelsus Prophecies - Predictions from the Father of Toxicology (1493-1541) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Swiss-German physician, alchemist, and astrologer Paracelsus (1493-1541) left prophetic writings about medicine, alchemy, and the future of civilization. His Prognostications contain predictions spanning centuries. Full archive with verification.
en.keywords: Paracelsus,Paracelsus prophecies,father of toxicology,alchemist,Prognostications,Theophrastus von Hohenheim,Renaissance prophecy,medical prophecy
en.ogTitle: Paracelsus Prophecies - The Alchemist's Complete Predictions
en.ogDescription: Prophetic writings from Paracelsus (1493-1541), Swiss-German physician and alchemist. Full archive with real-world verification covering medicine, civilization, and religion.
en.twitterDescription: Predictions from Paracelsus, the father of toxicology. Prophecies spanning medicine, alchemy, religion, and the future of civilization.
